Tap the bulb icon to suggest an editClick a line to suggest an edit

This world is about to end.

That's the background story of this game.

The Residents of the mercenary city 'Labyrinth', the setting of this game,

were starting their day as normal, unaware of the impending doom.

Merchants preparing their stalls from early in the morning.

Workers diligently moving large loads.

And...

instead of the grim-looking mercenary men who were supposed to make an Appearance,

there were even beautiful girl mercenaries busily walking the streets.

...Before coming in, I had installed too many mods.
